backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing product management (CRUD operations with admin-only access), user profile management, and role-based authorization using AccessControl and MixinAuthorization modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: swipeable Attack on Titan t-shirt gallery, Lookout button with Meesho affiliate link, and integration into ProductBrowse page.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration files with details on loading states, image handling, and authentication flows.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with custom OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and UI components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with 'Fashion Forum' title and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component with TanStack Router setup, route definitions (browse, detail, admin), and profile setup modal logic that waits for identity initialization.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied screen component displaying a shield alert icon and message for non-admin users attempting to access restricted pages.
frontend/src/components/AttackOnTitanGal: Swipeable gallery component for two Attack on Titan t-shirt images with navigation arrows, touch/mouse gesture support, image loading states, and a Lookout button linking to Meesho affiliate URL.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: Category filter component with button group for selecting product categories or showing all products with rounded pill-style buttons.
frontend/src/components/CategoryImageSec: Displays a collapsible category image section with a main thumbnail and expandable grid of product images. Uses lazy loading, skeleton states, and hover effects with ChevronDown/Up icons.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header containing logo, navigation, admin link (if authorized), and login/logout button. Includes footer with copyright and Caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/LoadingTimeout.t: Reusable loading component that displays a spinner initially and shows a timeout alert with retry button after a configurable delay (default 10 seconds).
frontend/src/components/MeeshoProductSec: Displays a single Meesho product image as a clickable link with lazy loading, hover scale effect, and "Look Out →" overlay text on hover.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component displaying product image, name, category badge, and price with Pinterest pin indicator. Uses lazy loading with skeleton state and hover scale effects.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: Form component for creating or editing products with fields for name, description, price, category, image URL, and optional Pinterest pin ID. Uses react-hook-form for validation.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog that prompts authenticated users to enter their name for profile setup. Cannot be dismissed and shows loading/error states during submission.
frontend/src/components/SwipeableGallery: A swipeable image gallery component with navigation arrows, image counter, and a promotional link. Uses touch and mouse gestures for swiping, displays loading states, and handles image errors with fallbacks.
frontend/src/components/WatchProductSect: Displays a carousel of watch product images with navigation controls and a Meesho link. Uses lazy loading and error handling for images.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication. Creates authenticated or anonymous actors based on identity state and initializes access control with admin tokens.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageLoader.ts: Custom hook for loading images with retry logic, fallback support, and loading/error states. Handles image load failures with configurable retry attempts and delays.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality. Manages authentication state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend data operations including user profiles, products, and admin checks. Provides mutations for creating, updating, and deleting products with toast notifications and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeGesture.ts: Custom hook that detects swipe gestures for both touch and mouse events. Provides callbacks for left/right swipes with configurable threshold distance.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Playfair Display and Inter), Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm neutral color palette with light and dark mode support for a fashion e-commerce theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminProducts.tsx: Admin page for managing products with CRUD operations (add, edit, delete), access control checking, and a table view with dialogs for product forms and delete confirmations.
frontend/src/pages/ProductBrowse.tsx: Main product browsing page featuring a hero banner, category filters, promotional images with Meesho links, swipeable galleries, and a grid of product cards with loading states and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Product detail page displaying a single product with image, name, price, description, category badge, and optional Pinterest link with navigation back to product list.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup functions for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens using OKLCH color space, typography settings with Inter and Playfair Display fonts, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking for a Fashion Forum app with swipeable photo interface features. Includes three existing features (swipeable photo gallery, Lookout button with Meesho affiliate link, and app integration) and three pending feature requests for implementing the photo gallery and adding static product images.
